case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. AMANDA REYES CASTILLO

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,119.48 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, AMANDA REYES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED MAR-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, AMANDA REYES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, AMANDA REYES CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
